[2018-05-07 08:15] .bky_1556 (bky): 7 implies you value the fission turrets at about BB. Combined.
[2018-05-07 08:16] liadahlia (Lia): ...i don't think that's how that really works

[2018-05-07 08:19] liadahlia (Lia): so i guess you can simplify that down to me valuing the fission turrets to ~1 gold each
[2018-05-07 08:26] kaelii: I feel like extra blues and 3rd or 4th reds on units are valued extra in pricing things.
[2018-05-07 08:27] kaelii: So even 8BG ematrix is a fair bit better than 8BB ematrix.
[2018-05-07 08:29] liadahlia (Lia): 8BG is a *lot* less clunky than 8BB
[2018-05-07 08:29] kaelii: Especially for P2 with natural conduit into natural blastforge
[2018-05-07 08:30] liadahlia (Lia): yeah, so you can generally get this unit a full turn earlier than ematrix as p2
[2018-05-07 08:30] liadahlia (Lia): although getting it too early is bad
[2018-05-07 08:30] kaelii: It fulfills the wall role for the early turns and then is ematrix by the time they ramp much.
[2018-05-07 08:30] liadahlia (Lia): so there's some finesse there
[2018-05-07 08:30] .bky_1556 (bky): P1 can DD DD BCD This+D
[2018-05-07 08:30] f300xen (f0x): intuitively, it feels like wall that you have to get early to get value out of
[2018-05-07 08:31] liadahlia (Lia): problem is, you don't want a wall too early
[2018-05-07 08:32] kaelii: You definitely don't buy it until they actually have some damage though unless they're doing some sort of venge all in which might still be risky on the clicks.
[2018-05-07 08:32] kaelii: And like, thermite does gross things if you buy it too early.
[2018-05-07 08:32] f300xen (f0x): yeah it's terrible against thermite
[2018-05-07 08:32] .bky_1556 (bky): Cut half that sentence.
[2018-05-07 08:32] .bky_1556 (bky): Thermite does gross things.
[2018-05-07 08:33] liadahlia (Lia): problem is, when they do have damage the fission starts to matter more
[2018-05-07 08:33] kaelii: "Here have a free thermite into 6 green!"
[2018-05-07 08:33] f300xen (f0x): it's not like 5GGB redeemer, which gave you wall value early
[2018-05-07 08:33] kaelii: I guess it is kinda hard to click both fissions.
[2018-05-07 08:33] kaelii: Unless you're clicking one early.
[2018-05-07 08:33] liadahlia (Lia): yeah you might click one early if it's a green set
[2018-05-07 08:34] liadahlia (Lia): seems worth it to me
[2018-05-07 08:34] liadahlia (Lia): anyways, i definitely think it's wrong to value this at 5gb
[2018-05-07 08:34] f300xen (f0x): fission takes 5 turns to die, which seems like way too long to cost it above 5 i think
[2018-05-07 08:34] liadahlia (Lia): in most cases it's strictly better than a wall when it's bought for absorb
[2018-05-07 08:35] kaelii: The other consideration is I don't know that you ever buy more than one of these.
[2018-05-07 08:35] liadahlia (Lia): you'd never buy more than 1 of ematrix if you can help it
[2018-05-07 08:35] f300xen (f0x): it is actively terrible for you to buy more than 1
[2018-05-07 08:35] f300xen (f0x): because past the first, you are buying -5 soak
[2018-05-07 08:35] liadahlia (Lia): most of the time ematrix is bought only when you're mindful of defensive supply
[2018-05-07 08:35] kaelii: If you lose your first one you almost certainly cannot rebuy the absorber.
[2018-05-07 08:36] f300xen (f0x): if you lose the first you are probably dead
[2018-05-07 08:36] kaelii: Unless you're losing it to pure botches or something.
[2018-05-07 08:36] liadahlia (Lia): yeah, you'd probably never want to lose the first one
[2018-05-07 08:36] f300xen (f0x): you can't buy it against botches because you would never buy it in a pure botch set
[2018-05-07 08:37] liadahlia (Lia): it'd certainly be much worse in a fast red set lol
[2018-05-07 08:37] liadahlia (Lia): still better than wall, but much worse than ematrix
[2018-05-07 08:37] f300xen (f0x): it's better than wall *if you disregard cost*
[2018-05-07 08:37] .bky_1556 (bky): I could see buying a second in the very specific case that you're vs. Iso Kronus breachproof and can kill the fissions after the off-turn.
[2018-05-07 08:38] liadahlia (Lia): but it's still a big absorb and you'd probably just win if you can hold on past fission lifespan in a red set
[2018-05-07 08:38] .bky_1556 (bky): And they have exactly 5 cryos left.
[2018-05-07 08:38] f300xen (f0x): scorch is not very breachproof
[2018-05-07 08:38] kaelii: Its not but you might still buy a second one on a scortch turn
[2018-05-07 08:39] f300xen (f0x): isn't that just 3 defense

[2018-05-07 08:42] kaelii: How much of a buff is it if you stick a build time // exhaust on the fissions?
[2018-05-07 08:44] liadahlia (Lia): i think build time on the fissions would actively make it worst :monkaS:
[2018-05-07 08:45] liadahlia (Lia): for example if you give fissions bt 2 i'd probably cost this unit like 5BG at max

--- Thread (50 messages, 2018-05-07) ---
[2018-05-07 20:25] kaelii: Crystal pact: ( ? :Gold: :Green: :Green: :Green: , supply 10 )
Purchase effect: Construct Prompt Barrier, Forcefield, and 3 :Fragile: Aegis and a :Lifespan: 4 Fission turret for the opponent.

Not sure if between Barrier & Forcefield or Forcefield & Plexo in strength?
[2018-05-07 20:28] kaelii: By fission time out you only get 2 health, but like blood pact its good defense now.
[2018-05-07 20:28] darkeisbein: sure but health now is better then health later
[2018-05-07 20:29] kaelii: True. It does cost a non-trivial amount of green, but I like the extra cuteness where clicking a fission you're given lets you buy one.
[2018-05-07 20:30] darkeisbein: that is pretty cute indeed
[2018-05-07 20:30] http404error: good Cluster Bolt flavor
[2018-05-07 20:32] darkeisbein: I think it should probably cost 3-4 Gold
[2018-05-07 20:32] kaelii: I just don't know how much to price it at. Aegis, plexo etc all tell me that 5 prompt soak is decently expensive, but blood pact tells me that the price is probably lower because you're giving an attacker away.
[2018-05-07 20:34] darkeisbein: I would take a value v for one health and an inflation rate r and then take v\*r^-1+v\*r^-2+v*r^-3 as the value of the fission turret as a baseline
[2018-05-07 20:36] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Why F+3hp aegis instead of just aegis?
[2018-05-07 20:37] kaelii: F+Small Aegis is more granular while not being perfectly granular over a couple turns while Barrier+Aegis is super non-granular over a couple turns.
[2018-05-07 20:40] http404error: I'm highly considering banning discussion of SDR in Unit Design Challenge threads
[2018-05-07 20:42] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Twin Ray (9 :Gold: :Green: :Green: , 4 Supply) 9 :Fragile: 
When bought: construct a Perforator for your opponent.
At the start of your turn, gain :Attack: :Attack:
[2018-05-07 20:43] leary93: Simple, but interesting. I like giving a perforator, because while it's an attacker, its hard to use it so more likely your opponent will use it to block
[2018-05-07 20:44] leary93: @http404error  ye it gets a bit much lately
[2018-05-07 20:45] http404error: The spirit of why it's important just tends to get lost a lot
[2018-05-07 20:45] http404error: and then people make incorrect statements that have only pedantic value at best
[2018-05-07 20:45] http404error: it happens every time

Crystal pact: ( ? :Gold: :Green: :Green: :Green: , supply 10 )
Purchase effect: Construct Prompt Barrier, Forcefield, and 3 :Fragile: Aegis and a :Lifespan: 4 Fission turret for the opponent.

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: By fission time out you only get 2 health, but like blood pact its good defense now.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: sure but health now is better then health later

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: True. It does cost a non-trivial amount of green, but I like the extra cuteness where clicking a fission you're given lets you buy one.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: that is pretty cute indeed

messages.author: http404error
messages.content: good Cluster Bolt flavor

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: I think it should probably cost 3-4 Gold

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: I just don't know how much to price it at. Aegis, plexo etc all tell me that 5 prompt soak is decently expensive, but blood pact tells me that the price is probably lower because you're giving an attacker away.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: I would take a value v for one health and an inflation rate r and then take v\*r^-1+v\*r^-2+v*r^-3 as the value of the fission turret as a baseline

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: F+Small Aegis is more granular while not being perfectly granular over a couple turns while Barrier+Aegis is super non-granular over a couple turns.
